name: dice-roll
description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for simulating dice rolls with support for standard dice notation and Fate/Fudge dice. It provides tools to parse dice notation strings (like "3d6+4") and generate random dice rolls. Integrates with MCP-compatible clients like Claude Desktop and features full input/output validation using Zod schemas. It supports both standard dice (NdS+M format) and Fate/Fudge dice (NdF format) commonly used in tabletop role-playing games.
